title: Task Envelope
description: The downward delegation contract. Sent from a higher layer to a lower layer in the agent tree.

task_id.description: Unique identifier. Generated by the delegator. Format: {layer}-{short_id}, e.g. 'fm-a1b2c3'.

goal.description: What success looks like. Not how to do it. One clear sentence.

context.description: Relevant background: file paths, prior decisions, constraints, summaries.

acceptance_criteria.description: How the delegator will judge the result. Each item is a testable statement.

max_tokens.description: Maximum token budget for this task (input + output combined).

max_cost_usd.description: Maximum dollar cost for this task.

max_turns.description: Maximum number of agent turns (maps to --max-turns in Claude Code).

allowed_tools.description: Whitelist of tools the worker may use. Empty = all allowed.

forbidden_actions.description: Actions the worker must not take (e.g. 'git push', 'rm -rf').

model.description: Preferred model for execution. Runtime adapter may override.

output_schema.description: Expected result format: 'free_text', 'json', 'file_path', 'diff', or a JSON schema URI.

parent_task_id.description: Links to the parent task for tracing through the tree.

intake_answers.description: Optional. Project Intake Gate answers from Section 11 of the architecture doc.

delegator_layer.description: Which layer sent this task. 0=Conductor, 1=Architect, 2=Floor Manager.

runtime_hint.description: Suggested runtime adapter. The orchestrator may override.
